title: SRE for AI — Multi-Agent Incident Response, Runbooks, Predictive Detection

questions.question: What multi-agent shape does the lesson recommend for AI SRE?
options: Random selection of one of three agents
Two agents in series with no supervisor
Supervisor agent that breaks the incident into sub-queries for specialized log, metric, and runbook agents, then synthesizes and presents to a human
questions.question_zh: 本课为 AI SRE 推荐哪种多 agent 形态？
options_zh: 在 3 个 agent 中随机选 1 个
两个 agent 串联，没有 supervisor
一个大一统的 agent 包揽所有
Supervisor agent 把事故拆成子查询，分给专门的 log、metric、runbook agent，再综合后呈给人类

questions.question: Which auto-remediation set does the lesson call safe?
options: Restart pod, revert a specific deploy, scale a pool within pre-approved bounds, enable a pre-approved feature flag
questions.question_zh: 本课认为哪一组自动修复操作是安全的？
options_zh: 重新设计服务拓扑
改动数据库
修改 IAM 策略
重启 pod、回滚指定的 deploy、按预批边界扩缩容池、启用预批的 feature flag

questions.question: How does NeuBird Hawkeye use adversarial evaluation to filter hallucinated root causes?
options: Two models independently analyze the same incident; agreement = high confidence, disagreement = escalate to human with both hypotheses
Picks the higher-confidence model's answer always
Runs the same model twice on the same input
questions.question_zh: NeuBird Hawkeye 怎样用对抗式评估过滤掉幻觉式根因？
options_zh: 两个模型独立分析同一事故；意见一致 = 高置信，分歧 = 升级到人类并附两套假设
使用 GAN 风格训练
永远选高置信模型的答案
把同一个模型在同一输入上跑两次

questions.question: What does operational memory solve in AI SRE?
options: Loss of tribal knowledge when teams turn over — runbooks and post-mortems live in a vector DB that agents retrieve on every incident
questions.question_zh: operational memory 在 AI SRE 中解决了什么问题？
options_zh: 推理 pod 的冷启动
网络出口过滤
团队轮换造成的 tribal knowledge 流失 —— runbook 和 postmortem 落进向量数据库，agent 在每次事故时都从中检索
Token 成本归因

questions.question: What MIT 2025 result does the lesson cite for pre-incident prediction?
options: 89% of outages predicted 10-15 minutes early using logs + GPU temps + API error patterns
questions.question_zh: 本课为预先发现事故引用了哪个 MIT 2025 年的结果？
options_zh: 1 秒提前量、100% 预测
用日志 + GPU 温度 + API 错误模式提前 10-15 分钟预测了 89% 的故障
预测仍未解决
10% 准确率、零提前量

questions.question: What operational constraint does the lesson stress about predictive detection?
options: Predictions should never be wired to action
Predictions without actuation are just dashboards — the operational question is what action (pre-drain, page, auto-scale) the prediction triggers
questions.question_zh: 本课强调预测式探测的运营约束是什么？
options_zh: 预测能替代 runbook
预测永远不应该接到动作上
没有动作的预测只是仪表盘 —— 运营层面的关键问题是预测应触发什么动作（pre-drain、page、自动扩容）
预测一直是准的
